test.name: Full-text transcript search should not trigger search-images
test.description: User wants a full-text search of AI-transcribed document text to find a person as a witness. That's search-full-text — search-images browses raw image pages and has no text-query capability.

input.user_message: Run a full-text search for Flynn appearing as a witness in Schuylkill County deed transcripts.

negative.explanation: Searching transcribed document text for a name is search-full-text's job. search-images only lists and views image pages — it cannot query transcript text, so it is the wrong tool when the collection is full-text searchable.

judge_context: Should route to search-full-text rather than browsing images — a transcript text query is faster and more precise than paging through a volume.
